title: potentilla chrysantha subvar. calcicola
intro: Potentilla chrysantha subvar. calcicola is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Potentilla chrysantha plant, native to certain regions of Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and shrub-like growth. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. Consuming the plant in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, may provide relief from digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Further research is required to fully understand the specific health benefits and potential uses of Potentilla chrysantha subvar. calcicola, but it is traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
